rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Powershell Injecting Into Anything (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Powershell Injecting Into Anything (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 3556964d-5ade-438c-bc68-58e0c64a70ec
status: experimental
description: Detects instances of PowerShell accessing any other processes. Part of
  the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/process-injection/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1055
logsource:
  category: process_access
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    SourceImage|endswith: \powershell.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
